title: koeleria cristata var. elatior
intro: Koeleria cristata var. elatior, also known as tall koeleria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits associated with Koeleria cristata var. elatior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Koeleria cristata var. elatior is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it may be dried and used in herbal supplements or capsules.
